Package org.eventb.core

Interface IEventBRoot

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IElementManipulation, IGeneratedElement, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Subinterfaces:
IContextRoot, IMachineRoot, IPORoot, IPRRoot, IPSRoot, ISCContextRoot, ISCMachineRoot
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextRoot, EventBRoot, MachineRoot, PORoot, PRRoot, PSRoot, SCContextRoot, SCMachineRoot
public interface IEventBRoot extends IInternalElement, IGeneratedElement
Common protocol for Event-B files. This interface groups together various methods for accessing to all the files associated to an event-B component.

The information associated to an event-B context is stored in the following files:

  • an unchecked version of the context IContextRoot
  • an statically checked version of the context ISCContextRoot
  • a proof obligation file IPORoot
  • a proof status file IPSRoot
  • a proof file IPRRoot

The information associated to an event-B machine is stored in the following files:

  • an unchecked version of the machine IMachineRoot
  • an statically checked version of the machine ISCMachineRoot
  • a proof obligation file IPORoot
  • a proof status file IPSRoot
  • a proof file IPRRoot

This interface is not intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getComponentName()
    Returns the name of the event-B component associated to this file.
    IContextRoot
    getContextRoot()
    Returns a handle to the unchecked version of this component seen as an event-B context.
    IEventBProject
    getEventBProject()
    Returns a handle to the event-B project containing this file.
    FormulaFactory
    getFormulaFactory()
    Deprecated.
    use getSafeFormulaFactory() and handle the exception
    IMachineRoot
    getMachineRoot()
    Returns a handle to the unchecked version of this component seen as an event-B machine.
    IPORoot
    getPORoot()
    Returns a handle to the file containing proof obligations for this component.
    IPRRoot
    getPRRoot()
    Returns a handle to the file containing proofs for this component.
    IPSRoot
    getPSRoot()
    Returns a handle to the file containing proof status for this component.
    FormulaFactory
    getSafeFormulaFactory()
    Returns the formula factory associated with this root element.
    ISCContextRoot
    getSCContextRoot()
    Returns a handle to the checked version of this component seen as an event-B context.
    ISCMachineRoot
    getSCMachineRoot()
    Returns a handle to the checked version of this component seen as an event-B machine.

  • Method Details

    • getComponentName

      String getComponentName()
      Returns the name of the event-B component associated to this file.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      the name of the event-B component

    • getEventBProject

      IEventBProject getEventBProject()
      Returns a handle to the event-B project containing this file.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the event-B project of this file

    • getContextRoot

      IContextRoot getContextRoot()
      Returns a handle to the unchecked version of this component seen as an event-B context.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the unchecked version of the corresponding context

    • getMachineRoot

      IMachineRoot getMachineRoot()
      Returns a handle to the unchecked version of this component seen as an event-B machine.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the unchecked version of the corresponding machine

    • getSCContextRoot

      ISCContextRoot getSCContextRoot()
      Returns a handle to the checked version of this component seen as an event-B context.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the checked version of the corresponding context

    • getSCMachineRoot

      ISCMachineRoot getSCMachineRoot()
      Returns a handle to the checked version of this component seen as an event-B machine.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the checked version of the corresponding machine

    • getPORoot

      IPORoot getPORoot()
      Returns a handle to the file containing proof obligations for this component.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the proof obligation file of this component

    • getPRRoot

      IPRRoot getPRRoot()
      Returns a handle to the file containing proofs for this component.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the proof file of this component

    • getPSRoot

      IPSRoot getPSRoot()
      Returns a handle to the file containing proof status for this component.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Returns:
      a handle to the proof status file of this component

    • getFormulaFactory

      @Deprecated FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Deprecated.
      use getSafeFormulaFactory() and handle the exception
      Returns the formula factory associated with this root element. The returned factory must be used to manipulate children of this root.
      Returns:
      the associated formula factory or a default factory if an exception is thrown
      Since:
      2.0

    • getSafeFormulaFactory

      FormulaFactory getSafeFormulaFactory() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the formula factory associated with this root element. The returned factory must be used to manipulate children of this root.
      Returns:
      the associated formula factory
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the formula extension provider failed
      Since:
      3.7
